question: What courses do you offer?
answer: We offer 6 courses: N8N AI Automation, Make.com Automation, Agentic AI Systems, Cloud Deployment (AWS/GCP/Azure/Modal), Network Engineering, and AI Business Consulting. All are available free in the Learning Hub.

question: Are the courses free?
answer: Yes, all courses on our platform are completely free. You can access them via the Learning Hub on our website and earn a verified certificate after passing the quiz.

question: How do I get a certificate?
answer: Open any free course card and click 'Practice & Get Cert'. Answer the quiz with 75% or above and your certificate is generated instantly — both a PDF download and a permanent online URL.

question: What is n8n?
answer: N8N is an open-source workflow automation tool that connects apps and services without code. IT Solutions MM teaches N8N for building AI-powered automations, webhook triggers, API integrations, and real-world business workflows.

question: What is Make.com?
answer: Make.com (formerly Integromat) is a visual automation platform. Our Make.com course covers scenario building, data mapping, error handling, and integrating AI into automated business processes.

question: What is agentic AI?
answer: Agentic AI refers to AI systems that can plan, reason, and take actions autonomously. Our Agentic AI course covers building autonomous agents, RAG (retrieval-augmented generation), multi-agent pipelines, and production deployment.

question: What cloud platforms do you cover?
answer: Our cloud course covers AWS, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Microsoft Azure, and Modal serverless. Topics include cloud architecture, cost optimisation, serverless deployment, and CI/CD pipelines.

question: What network topics do you teach?
answer: Our network course covers BGP, OSPF, SD-WAN, Zero Trust security, VLAN configuration, firewall rules, and network automation with Python — from CCNA-level fundamentals to enterprise-grade design.

question: What is AI consulting?
answer: Our AI Business Consulting course teaches how to apply AI automation to real business problems: process analysis, ROI calculation, tool selection, and presenting AI solutions to clients in Myanmar and Southeast Asia.

question: How do I contact you?
answer: You can reach us via Telegram @MaterAITraining_bot, WhatsApp +66949567820, or email itsolutions.mm@gmail.com. Use the Contact form on our website for inquiries.

question: Who is the founder?
answer: IT Solutions MM was founded by MR. KYAW ZIN TUN, an expert in AI Automation, N8N, Make.com, Python, Cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure/Modal), and Network Engineering based in Myanmar.

question: What is IT Solutions MM?
answer: IT Solutions MM is an AI Automation training platform based in Myanmar. We provide free AI courses, live Telegram AI support, and certified training in N8N, Make.com, Cloud, and Network Engineering.

question: How long do the courses take?
answer: Each course has 10 modules. You can study at your own pace. To unlock the certificate quiz you need to review at least 50% of the modules, then score 75% on the quiz.

question: What score do I need to pass the quiz?
answer: You need 75% or above on the quiz to earn your certificate. The quiz has 10 random questions drawn from a 15-question bank for each course.

question: Is there a Telegram bot?
answer: Yes — @MaterAITraining_bot on Telegram is our AI assistant. It answers questions about AI automation, our courses, and IT Solutions MM services in both English and Burmese.

question: Do you support Burmese language?
answer: Yes. Our AI assistant on the website and on Telegram automatically detects if you write in Burmese (Myanmar script) and replies entirely in Burmese.

question: What is the AI Pulse feed?
answer: AI Pulse is our live news section that aggregates the latest AI industry updates from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Meta AI, Mistral, HuggingFace, and NVIDIA — refreshed every 6 hours.

question: Can I subscribe to AI news updates?
answer: Yes. Enter your email in the AI Pulse section of our website to receive a free weekly AI digest every Monday with the top AI industry updates.

question: How do I install n8n?
answer: Install n8n globally with: npm install n8n -g. Then run it with: n8n start. For cloud deployment use Docker or a VPS. IT Solutions MM's N8N course covers both local and cloud installation step by step.

question: How do I connect an API in n8n?
answer: In n8n, add an HTTP Request node, set the method (GET/POST), enter the API URL, and add headers or authentication as needed. Our N8N course covers REST API connections, webhooks, and OAuth in detail.
